final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from a central position, facing an East Asian man and his golden retriever dog. The man stands in the center with light skin, short dark hair, and a smiling expression, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt and khaki pants with white shoes. The dog sits to the man's right from the viewer's perspective, with golden fur and a calm demeanor. The ground is entirely covered in a smooth layer of white snow, with faint footprints visible. Numerous people populate the park: in the background, individuals and groups walk along snow-dusted paths, some sit on dark wooden benches under trees with green leaves lightly dusted with snow, and others stand talking, dressed in winter attire like coats, hats, and scarves, with a mix of ethnicities including East Asian and Caucasian. The trees have brown trunks and green foliage, now lightly coated with snow. Two dark wooden benches are visible in the background left and right, with people sitting on them. Beyond, a body of water clearly reflects the overcast sky, and a distant city skyline is visible. The sky is gray and overcast, providing soft, diffused lighting with no harsh shadows. The atmosphere is serene and wintry, with a cool color palette dominated by whites, grays, and muted greens. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural composition.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a park scene viewed from a central position, facing an East Asian man and his golden retriever dog. The man stands in the CENTER with light skin, short dark hair, and a smiling expression, wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt and khaki pants with white shoes. The dog sits to his RIGHT with golden fur and a calm demeanor. The ground is entirely covered in a smooth layer of white snow, with faint footprints visible. Numerous people populate the park: in the BACKGROUND, individuals and groups walk along snow-dusted paths, some sit on dark wooden benches under trees with green leaves lightly dusted with snow, and others stand talking, dressed in winter attire like coats, hats, and scarves, with a mix of ethnicities including East Asian, Caucasian, and others. The trees have brown trunks and green foliage, now lightly coated with snow. Two dark wooden benches are visible in the BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT. Beyond, a body of water reflects the overcast sky, and a distant city skyline is visible. The sky is gray and overcast, providing soft, even lighting with no harsh shadows. The atmosphere is serene and wintry, with a cool color palette dominated by whites, grays, and muted greens. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural composition. Perspective: Camera viewpoint: eye-level, facing the subjects in the center; Spatial positions: Man in CENTER, dog to his RIGHT, benches in BACKGROUND LEFT and RIGHT, trees on LEFT and BACKGROUND, water and skyline in far BACKGROUND; Lighting quality: bright daylight with soft shadows cast by trees and subjects, sun overhead. Style reference: For the man: East Asian ethnicity, light skin with warm undertone, dark hair, smiling facial features, lean build, wearing light blue shirt and khaki pants; Dominant color palette: natural greens from grass and trees, blue from sky and shirt, warm tones from dog's fur and man's skin; Surface materials: grass texture, fabric of man's shirt and pants, fur of dog; Overall atmosphere: peaceful, sunny day in a park.

constraints: Is the camera viewpoint at eye-level?
Is the man positioned in the center of the image?
Is the dog sitting to the right of the man?
Is the man of East Asian ethnicity with light skin, short dark hair, and a smiling expression?
Is the man wearing a light blue short-sleeve button-up shirt?
Is the man wearing khaki pants?
Is the man wearing white shoes?
Does the dog have golden fur and a calm demeanor?
Is the ground entirely covered in smooth white snow with faint footprints?
Are there numerous people in the background?
Are some background people walking along snow-dusted paths?
Are some background people sitting on dark wooden benches?
Are some background people standing and talking?
Are background people dressed in winter attire like coats, hats, and scarves?
Do the trees have brown trunks and green foliage lightly coated with snow?
Are there two dark wooden benches visible in the background, one on the left and one on the right?
Is there a body of water reflecting the overcast sky in the background?
Is a distant city skyline visible beyond the water?
Is the sky gray and overcast?
Is the lighting soft and even with no harsh shadows?
Does the scene have a serene and wintry atmosphere?
Is the dominant color palette composed of whites, grays, and muted greens?
Is the image photorealistic with sharp focus and natural composition?
Are the spatial positions correct: man in center, dog to right, benches in background left and right, trees on left and background, water and skyline in far background?
